PowerShell(node -e "const s=require\('sharp'\); s\('public/textures/malaka_stone_diff.jpg'\).stats\(\).then\(r=>{const c=r.channels; console.log\('avg rgb', Math.round\(c[0].mean\), Math.round\(c[1].mean\), Math.round\(c[2].mean\)\); console.log\('hex', '0x'+[c[0].mean,c[1].mean,c[2].mean].map\(v=>Math.round\(v\).toString\(16\).padStart\(2,'0'\)\).join\(''\)\);}\).catch\(e=>console.log\('ERR',e.message\)\)")
